zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Margaret Welby於大約1378年出生在英國林可爾史爾莫爾頓時，她的父親Richard De Welby IV24歲，母親Margaret De Welby19歲。她於1389年之後與Richard Sarsonne de Pinchbeck在英國林可爾史爾莫爾頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1465年在英國林可爾史爾平賀貝可享年88歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Margaret Welby于大约1378年出生在英国林可爾史爾莫爾頓时，她的父亲Richard De Welby IV24岁，母亲Margaret De Welby19岁。她于1389年之后与Richard Sarsonne de Pinchbeck在英国林可爾史爾莫爾頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1465年在英国林可爾史爾平賀貝可享年88岁。

nameMeanings.name: Welby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from either of two places called Welby, one in Leicestershire and one in Lincolnshire. The Lincolnshire placename derives from Old English wella ‘well, spring, stream’ + Old Norse bý ‘farmstead, village’. The Leicestershire placename is recorded as Alebi in 1086 and Welby in 1518, and derives from the Old Norse personal name Áli + Old Norse bý. The name is established in Ireland (Galway).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Margaret Welby was born about 1378, in Moulton, Lincolnshire, England, her father, Richard De Welby IV, was 24 and her mother, Margaret De Welby, was 19. She married Richard Sarsonne de Pinchbeck after 1389, in Moulton, Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1465, in Pinchbeck, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 88.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Margaret Welby est née environ 1378, à Moulton, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard De Welby IV, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Margaret De Welby, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Sarsonne de Pinchbeck après 1389, à Moulton, Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1465, à Pinchbeck, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 88 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Margaret Welby um 1378 in Moulton, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard De Welby IV 24 und ihre Mutter Margaret De Welby 19. Sie hat nach 1389 in Moulton, Lincolnshire, England Richard Sarsonne de Pinchbeck geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1465 im Alter von 88 Jahren in Pinchbeck, Lincolnshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret Welby è nata il circa 1378 nel Moulton, Lincolnshire, England, sua padre, Richard De Welby IV, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Margaret De Welby, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Richard Sarsonne de Pinchbeck dopo il 1389, nel Moulton, Lincolnshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1465, nel Pinchbeck, Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 88 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Welbyが約1378年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアモウルトンで生まれた時，父Richard De Welby IVは24歳，母Margaret De Welbyは19歳であった。1389年以後にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアモウルトンでRichard Sarsonne de Pinchbeckと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1465年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアピンチベックで88歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Welby(이)가 대략 1378년 영국 링코실르 모우턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard De Welby IV(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret De Welby(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1389년 이후 영국 링코실르 모우턴에서 Richard Sarsonne de Pinchbeck(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1465년 영국 링코실르 핀ch벡에서 88세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret Welby nasceu aproximadamente 1378, em Moulton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard De Welby IV, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Margaret De Welby, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Sarsonne de Pinchbeck após 1389, em Moulton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1465, em Pinchbeck, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 88 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Margaret Welby родилась около 1378 г. в местности моултон, линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard De Welby IV было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret De Welby, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Sarsonne de Pinchbeck после 1389 г. в местности моултон, линколншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1465 г. в местности пинчбекк, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 88 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Margaret Welby nació aproximadamente 1378, en Moulton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard De Welby IV, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Margaret De Welby, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Richard Sarsonne de Pinchbeck después de 1389, en Moulton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1465, en Pinchbeck, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 88 años.
